title: Consultancy for System Design and BRD for Shared Microfinance Institutions Services
description: FSDT invites consultants to provide services for system design and development of a Business Requirements Document (BRD) for a shared microfinance institutions services platform for non-deposit taking, credit-only lenders. Part of the EU-funded Inclusive Finance for Growth of Women and Youth MSMEs programme.
scrape_notes: Detail page behind Mabumbe paywall. Closing date estimated. Title and dates from listing/search page.
